We feel that through Emma's workshops our participants were able to set goals, gain confidence and developed significant leadership skills. Thank you, Emma for the time and effort you put into each session. Eibhlin Fitzpatrick The Rediscovery Centre Contact Emma Get in touch by filling out this form First Name Last Name Email Message Submit Thanks for your message. Let's Chat Emma Cosgrove   emma@coachingbyemma. com | coachingbyemma.

Read More Work with Emma Coaching Facilitation More Info Emma is a fantastic coach and facilitator. We asked Emma to develop workshops as part of a wider education programme and I would not hesitate in working with her again or recommending her to others. Her professional, empathetic and adaptive approach really brought our participants together. She ensured that each session was accessible and relevant to the participants needs.

I work with clients across a range of industries, including Tech, Finance, Healthcare, Professional Services, Engineering and Design. I am certified in Personal, Leadership and Corporate Wellbeing Coaching with 10 years corporate experience. I was a Corporate Coach and Team Development Consultant in Google Ireland before founding Coaching by Emma. I offer coaching and facilitation to clients in Ireland and worldwide.
